refnamediv.refpurpose: Keep connected components within an area range.

refsynopsisdiv.title: Syntax
refsynopsisdiv.synopsis: bwout = bwareafilt(image, areaRange); bwout = bwareafilt(image, areaRange, connectivity)

listitem.para: A positive minimum area or inclusive [min max] range.

refsection.title: Description
refsection.para: bwareafilt measures connected components and retains those whose pixel areas fall within the requested range.

refsection.title: Examples
refsection.programlisting: mask = zeros(7, 7) == 1; mask(2, 2) = %t; mask(4:6, 4:6) = %t; result = bwareafilt(mask, [2 10]);
